transcript: Speaker A: Do you like coffee? Speaker B: Yes, I like. Speaker A: Do you mean yes, I do? Speaker B: Yes, I do. Sorry. Speaker A: If the question starts with "Do", you must answer it with "Do". Speaker B: Alright. Speaker A: Do you study English? Speaker B: Uh, no, I do. Speaker A: Do you mean "No, I don't"? Speaker B: Yes. No, I do not. Speaker A: You should download Loora. Speaker B: What's so special about it? Speaker A: You'll have a personalized study plan and an AI tutor to help you get better at English. Speaker B: But I do not have time to study English. Speaker A: With Loora, you can learn and practice anytime and anywhere you want. Speaker B: Really? I'll download Loora right now.
on_screen_text: Do you like coffee? ❌Yes, I like. Do you mean yes, I do? ✅Yes, I do. If the question starts with "Do" you must answer it with "Do". Alright. Do you study English? ❌No, I do. Do you mean "No, I don't"? ✅No, I do not. You should download Loora. What's so special about it? You'll have a personalized study plan and an AI tutor to help you get better at English. But I do not have time to study English. With Loora you can learn and practice anytime and anywhere you want. Really? I'll download Loora right now. Loora
summary: An AI avatar corrects a user's English grammar in a split-screen format. The avatar then pitches the Loora app as a flexible, personalized AI tutoring solution for busy learners, prompting the user to download it.
